title: Hierarchical Inference with an Offload Queue
abstract: Queueing-theoretic models for hierarchical inference that jointly optimize accuracy and delay under offload constraints.

title: Inference Offloading for Cost-Sensitive Binary Classification at the Edge
abstract: A two-threshold online learning policy for edge inference offloading that remains effective under out-of-distribution data.

title: Exploring the Boundaries of On-Device Inference: When Tiny Falls Short, Go Hierarchical
abstract: Extensive energy, latency, and communication measurements of tinyML models across Arduino, ESP32, Coral, Raspberry Pi, and Jetson platforms.

title: Online Learning with Stochastically Partitioning Experts
abstract: New regret bounds for expert-based online learning when the expert partition changes stochastically over time.

title: Regret Bounds for Online Learning for Hierarchical Inference
abstract: Introduces regret-optimal learning algorithms for offload decisions in hierarchical inference under adversarial conditions.

title: Getting the Best Out of Both Worlds: Algorithms for Hierarchical Inference at the Edge
abstract: Foundational formulation of hierarchical inference with threshold-based and learning-based offload algorithms.

title: Improved Decision Module Selection for Hierarchical Inference in Resource-Constrained Edge Devices
abstract: Practical decision-module design for choosing when to offload on resource-constrained hardware.

title: The Case for Hierarchical Deep Learning Inference at the Network Edge
abstract: Position paper arguing for hierarchical inference as a first-class primitive in edge intelligence systems.

title: Offloading Algorithms for Maximizing Inference Accuracy on Edge Device Under a Time Constraint
abstract: Approximation algorithms for maximizing inference accuracy under strict latency constraints on edge devices.
